title: salix miyabeana subsp. gymnolepis
intro: Salix miyabeana subsp. gymnolepis, also known as the Japanese willow or Miyabe's willow, is a plant species in the family Salicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Salix miyabeana subsp. gymnolepis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
